description: Banking-grade hot files. Each entry MUST also be in stryker.config.mjs `mutate:` list. The hot-files gate script enforces killRatioMin per file.

hotFiles.rationale: Input guardrail — blocks insults, off-topic, prompt injection. Banking-grade contract.
Cursor encode/decode — IDOR risk if a mutant flips the boundary check.
sanitizePromptInput — Unicode normalisation + zero-width strip + truncation. SSRF/injection adjacent.
Audit log chain integrity. Mutation here = silent compliance break.
Circuit breaker for LLM provider failures. Mutation = stuck-open or stuck-closed.
Refresh-token rotation persistence. Mutation = token-reuse vulnerability.

Auth session orchestration façade. Co-pinned with refresh-token repo. Post-Step-G the security-critical logic moved to session-issuer + token-jwt + mfa-gate; the façade still flows the contract end-to-end.

Refresh-token rotation contract: assertRefreshTokenUsable + issueSession. Mutation = token-reuse vulnerability or stuck-open idle window. Banking-grade — co-pinned with refresh-token repo and authSession façade.
JWT sign/verify (iss/aud pinning, alg allowlist). Mutation = forged or none-alg token accepted. Ramp wave 1 (2026-07-12) — measured 91.9% (clean-room).
Guardrail evaluation orchestration (V1 keyword + V2 judge/sidecar routing, ADR-015). Mutation = safety-layer bypass. Ramp wave 1 (2026-07-12) — measured 82.5%.
V2 LLM Guard sidecar adapter (fail-closed, circuit breaker, ADR-047). Mutation = injection/PII scan silently skipped. Ramp wave 1 (2026-07-12) — measured 86.5%.
V2 LLM-as-judge guardrail (fail-open, budget-gated). Mutation = uncertain-allow judgment corrupted. Ramp wave 1 (2026-07-12) — measured 94.7%.
